from sqlalchemy import text
import pandas as pd

# Step 1: Resolve entity - find 'Construction Building' station
query_station = text("""
SELECT id, name, district_id, city_id
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE name = 'Construction Building'
""")
station_df = pd.read_sql(query_station, engine)
print("Station resolution:")
print(station_df)

if len(station_df) > 0:
    construction_building_id = station_df['id'].iloc[0]
    print(f"\nRESOLVED: Construction Building = {construction_building_id}")
else:
    construction_building_id = None
    print("UNRESOLVED: Construction Building")

from sqlalchemy import text
import pandas as pd

# Try fuzzy search for Construction Building station
query_fuzzy = text("""
SELECT id, name, district_id, city_id
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE name ILIKE '%Construction%' OR name ILIKE '%Building%' OR name ILIKE '%施工%' OR name ILIKE '%建筑%'
""")
station_df = pd.read_sql(query_fuzzy, engine)
print("Fuzzy search results:")
print(station_df)

if len(station_df) > 0:
    # Try to find the best match
    for idx, row in station_df.iterrows():
        if 'Construction Building' in row['name'] or 'Construction' in row['name'] or 'Building' in row['name']:
            construction_building_id = row['id']
            print(f"\nRESOLVED: Construction Building = {construction_building_id} (matched: {row['name']})")
            break
    else:
        # If no exact match, use the first one
        construction_building_id = station_df['id'].iloc[0]
        print(f"\nRESOLVED: Construction Building = {construction_building_id} (matched: {station_df['name'].iloc[0]})")
else:
    construction_building_id = None
    print("UNRESOLVED: Construction Building")

from sqlalchemy import text
import pandas as pd

# Check if there are any dust stations (construction-related)
query_dust = text("""
SELECT id, name, construction_site_id
FROM dust_station
WHERE name ILIKE '%Construction%' OR name ILIKE '%Building%' OR name ILIKE '%施工%' OR name ILIKE '%建筑%'
""")
dust_df = pd.read_sql(query_dust, engine)
print("Dust station search results:")
print(dust_df)

# Also check all air quality stations to see what's available
query_all_stations = text("""
SELECT id, name, station_type
FROM air_quality_station
LIMIT 20
""")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all_stations, engine)
print("\nSample of air quality stations:")
print(all_stations)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 首先查找Construction Building站点的id
query = text("""
SELECT id, name, station_type, district_id, city_id
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE name LIKE '%Construction Building%' OR name LIKE '%Construction%' OR name LIKE '%Building%'
LIMIT 20
""")
station_df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("Station search results:")
print(station_df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 尝试更广泛的搜索，查找包含Construction或Building的站点
query = text("""
SELECT id, name, station_type, district_id, city_id
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%construction%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%building%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%施工%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%建筑%'
LIMIT 20
""")
station_df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("Station search results (broader):")
print(station_df)

# 同时检查dust_station表
query2 = text("""
SELECT ds.id, ds.name, cs.name as construction_site_name, cs.id as construction_site_id
FROM dust_station ds
JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id
WHERE LOWER(cs.name) LIKE '%construction%' OR LOWER(cs.name) LIKE '%building%' OR LOWER(cs.name) LIKE '%施工%' OR LOWER(cs.name) LIKE '%建筑%'
LIMIT 20
""")
dust_df = pd.read_sql(query2, engine)
print("\nDust station search results:")
print(dust_df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索名为"Construction Building"的dust_station
query = text("""
SELECT ds.id, ds.name, cs.name as construction_site_name, cs.id as construction_site_id
FROM dust_station ds
JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id
WHERE LOWER(ds.name) = 'construction building' OR LOWER(cs.name) = 'construction building'
LIMIT 10
""")
result_df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("Construction Building station search:")
print(result_df)

# 如果没找到，尝试搜索包含Construction Building的站点
if result_df.empty:
    query2 = text("""
    SELECT ds.id, ds.name, cs.name as construction_site_name, cs.id as construction_site_id
    FROM dust_station ds
    JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id
    WHERE LOWER(ds.name) LIKE '%construction building%' OR LOWER(cs.name) LIKE '%construction building%'
    LIMIT 10
    """)
    result_df2 = pd.read_sql(query2, engine)
    print("\nBroader search results:")
    print(result_df2)

import pandas as pd

SELECT ds.id, ds.name, cs.name as construction_site_name, cs.id as construction_site_id

JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 首先查找Construction Building站点的id
# 可能是普通空气质量站点或扬尘监测站
query_station = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
WHERE aqs.name ILIKE '%Construction Building%'
LIMIT 10
""")
station_df = pd.read_sql(query_station, engine)
print("普通空气质量站点匹配:")
print(station_df)

# 也检查扬尘监测站
query_dust = text("""
SELECT ds.id, ds.name, cs.name as construction_site_name
FROM dust_station ds
JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id
WHERE ds.name ILIKE '%Construction Building%' OR cs.name ILIKE '%Construction Building%'
LIMIT 10
""")
dust_df = pd.read_sql(query_dust, engine)
print("\n扬尘监测站匹配:")
print(dust_df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 尝试更宽泛的搜索，查找包含Construction或Building的站点
query_all = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
WHERE aqs.name ILIKE '%construction%' OR aqs.name ILIKE '%building%' OR aqs.name ILIKE '%施工%' OR aqs.name ILIKE '%工地%'
LIMIT 20
""")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)
print("包含Construction/Building的普通站点:")
print(all_stations)

# 检查扬尘站
query_dust_all = text("""
SELECT ds.id, ds.name, cs.name as construction_site_name, cs.status
FROM dust_station ds
JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id
WHERE ds.name ILIKE '%construction%' OR ds.name ILIKE '%building%' OR cs.name ILIKE '%construction%' OR cs.name ILIKE '%building%' OR cs.name ILIKE '%施工%' OR cs.name ILIKE '%工地%'
LIMIT 20
""")
dust_df_all = pd.read_sql(query_dust_all, engine)
print("\n包含Construction/Building的扬尘站:")
print(dust_df_all)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看dust_station表中所有站点的名称
query_dust_names = text("""
SELECT id, name, station_code, construction_site_id
FROM dust_station
""")
dust_names_df = pd.read_sql(query_dust_names, engine)
print("扬尘站点名称列表:")
print(dust_names_df)

# 筛选包含"Construction"或"Building"的站点
filtered_dust = dust_names_df[dust_names_df['name'].str.contains('Construction|Building|工地|建筑', case=False, na=False)]
print("\n筛选后的扬尘站点:")
print(filtered_dust)

# 同时查看air_quality_station的所有名称
query_all_stations = text("""
SELECT id, name, station_type, district_id, city_id
FROM air_quality_station
""")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all_stations, engine)
print("\n空气质量站点名称列表:")
print(all_stations)

# 筛选包含"Construction"或"Building"的空气质量站点
filtered_stations = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains('Construction|Building|工地|建筑', case=False, na=False)]
print("\n筛选后的空气质量站点:")
print(filtered_stations)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 在dust_station表中精确搜索名称为"Construction Building"的站点

SELECT id, name, station_code, construction_site_id
FROM dust_station
WHERE name = 'Construction Building'
""")
exact_df = pd.read_sql(query_exact, engine)

# 如果没找到，查看construction_site表中是否有名为"Construction Building"的工地
